name: Dynamic DNS
overview: Keep your DNS records pointed at your server's current public IP.
description: Dynamic DNS keeps one or more DNS records pointed at your Jellyfin server's current public IP. It runs in-process as a scheduled task and updates Cloudflare, DuckDNS, or any dyndns2-compatible provider over outbound HTTP/S.

versions.changelog:
## Initial release

This plugin acts as a DDNS resolver using Jellyfin as its host. A lot of this work will look very similar to [ddclient](https://github.com/ddclient/ddclient) which was a huge help and inspiration for this plugin. This takes the work they've taken and wraps it into a Jellyfin plugin for server owners don't want to manage more than one application.
